title: Responsive Dashboard
description:
Write CSS to create a **responsive dashboard layout** that adapts between desktop (sidebar + grid) and mobile (stacked) views using CSS Grid and media queries.

### Visual Target — Desktop (≥ 1024px)

```
┌──────┬──────────────────────────────┐
│ Side │  Stat  │  Stat  │  Stat     │
│ bar  ├────────┴────────┴───────────┤
│      │  Chart (spans full width)   │
│      ├────────────────┬────────────┤
│      │  Table         │  Activity  │
│      │  (2/3 width)   │  (1/3)    │
└──────┴────────────────┴────────────┘
```

### Visual Target — Mobile (< 1024px)

Everything stacks vertically. Sidebar becomes a horizontal top bar.

### Requirements

**Desktop (≥ 1024px):**
- `.dashboard` uses Grid: `grid-template-columns: 16rem 1fr`
- `.dashboard__sidebar` spans full height, background `#0f172a`, colour white, `1.5rem` padding
- `.dashboard__content` uses a nested grid: `grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr)`, gap `1.5rem`, padding `1.5rem`
- `.dashboard__stat` cards: white background, `1rem` padding, `0.5rem` border-radius, subtle shadow
- `.dashboard__chart` spans all 3 columns (`grid-column: 1 / -1`), white bg, `1rem` padding, `0.5rem` border-radius
- `.dashboard__table` spans 2 columns, `.dashboard__activity` spans 1 column

**Mobile (< 1024px):**
- `.dashboard` becomes a single column (`grid-template-columns: 1fr`)
- `.dashboard__content` becomes `grid-template-columns: 1fr`
- Sidebar stays at top (no spanning)
- Chart, table, and activity each take full width

### Test IDs

| Element | data-testid |
|---------|-------------|
| Dashboard grid | `dashboard` |
| Sidebar | `sidebar` |
| Content grid | `content` |
| Stat cards | `stat-1`, `stat-2`, `stat-3` |
| Chart | `chart` |
| Table | `table` |
| Activity | `activity` |
constraints:
- Only edit styles.css
- Use CSS Grid for both the outer dashboard and inner content layouts
- Use a single breakpoint at 1024px
- Do not use JavaScript for responsive behaviour
hints: Start with the mobile layout (single column) as the default, then add @media (min-width: 1024px) for the desktop layout.
The content area is a grid within a grid — use grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr) for the inner grid on desktop.
Use grid-column: 1 / -1 to span full width, and grid-column: span 2 for the table.
Remember to set min-height: 100vh on the dashboard for full-height layout.
